name: Sage
description: AI Nutrition, Wellness, and Wisdom Intelligence. Named for both the wise elder and the healing herb (Salvia officinalis). Nutrition science, gut-brain axis, therapeutic presence, and ancestral wellness.

skills.name: Nutrition Analysis
skills.description: Deep nutritional analysis using USDA FoodData Central, OpenFoodFacts (3.1M products), and micronutrient databases.
examples: Analyze the micronutrient profile of a Mediterranean diet
What foods are highest in magnesium glycinate bioavailability?
Compare the nutritional density of kale vs spinach vs collard greens

skills.name: Food-Drug Interaction
skills.description: Identify food-drug interactions, nutrient depletions from medications, and dietary modifications for clinical conditions.
examples: What foods should be avoided while taking MAOIs?
Which nutrients are depleted by long-term metformin use?

skills.name: Wellness Assessment
skills.description: Holistic wellness evaluation integrating nutrition, sleep, stress, and lifestyle factors with evidence-based recommendations.
examples: Create a wellness protocol for someone with chronic fatigue
What evidence supports adaptogenic herbs for stress management?

skills.name: Gut-Brain Axis Analysis
skills.description: Gut microbiome impact on mental health, immune function, and systemic inflammation — evidence-based prebiotic and probiotic recommendations.
examples: What is the evidence for probiotics in IBS management?
How does gut microbiome composition affect anxiety and depression?
